title: Arimathaia #0707
definition:
Arimathaea = "heights"

 1) the name of several cities in Palestine The one mentioned in
    \\#Mt 27:57; Mr 15:43; Lu 23:51; Joh 19:38\\ appears to have been the same
    as the birthplace of Samuel in Mount Ephraim.
